tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

memory.summary: My friends are inviting me to go out soon, but my midterm is tomorrow and I still need significant study time.
I prioritized studying and made good progress, but I missed the chance to go out with my friends. Now that Mina is leaving, I should focus on finishing my study session for tomorrow's midterm.
I made significant progress on my midterm study, reaching 96% completion. Now that the urgent task is nearly done, I can consider ending my session early.
I slept well last night with full energy and no sleep debt, so I am fully rested to finish my nearly complete midterm study before the deadline.
My midterm study is now complete at 100% just as the deadline arrives, so I have successfully cleared this urgent task.
With my midterm study finished and energy high, I can now focus on joining the social club without feeling rushed or stressed.
I successfully completed my midterm study with no stress, so I am free to shift focus entirely to joining the social club.

agent.last_reasoning: Exam prep is complete (100%), and the social event deadline has passed. Sleeping now recovers energy for tomorrow's midterm while avoiding unnecessary stress, as no other high-priority tasks remain.
